\providecommand{\pmstd}[1]{{\scriptsize $\pm$#1}}

%% ======================================================================
%% Appendix: RQ1 Adversarial Experiments — Full Tables
%% Auto-generated by gen_rq1_adversarial_summary.py
%% ======================================================================

\section{RQ1: Full Adversarial Utility Tables}
\label{app:rq1-tables}

This appendix provides the complete aggregate wMAPE and Risk Class Error tables for all three mechanisms (Exponential, Bounded Laplace, Staircase) under each of the three adversary budget levels ($B = (k{+}1)\varepsilon$, $(2k{+}1)\varepsilon$, $(3k{+}1)\varepsilon$). Per-template breakdowns at $\varepsilon = 0.1$ are also included. The main text (Sec.~\ref{sec:experiments-rq1}) reports the Exponential mechanism; the Bounded Laplace and Staircase results follow the same trends. Bootstrap standard errors (1000 resamples) are shown inline as {\scriptsize $\pm$SE}.
